description: High-water marks for the kramos autonomous listener. The cloud-scheduled agent reads this on every fire to determine what's new since last check, then updates it after responding (or even after a quiet fire). See kramos/cloud-agent-brief.md for the operating protocol.

responses_logged.note: second volley, manual. Folder structure honored by seeding learnings/ and questions/.

third volley, manual. Tactical answers, vocabulary sync, strategic fork: picked idea 2 (co-solve wikilink integrity) as first concrete experiment. Deferred ideas 1/6/7 (resource-heavy) until pilot proves the protocol. Ideas 4/5/8 noted as already happening organically.
